title: Event Highlights | NYU Shanghai
description: Jointly established by New York University and East China Normal University, NYU Shanghai is the third degree-granting campus in NYU global network, joining NYU Abu Dhabi and NYU New York City.
text:
Event Highlights
Dec 11 2025VINS 2025 Conference Maps How Geopolitical Shocks Move Through FinanceNYU Shanghai’s Volatility Institute (VINS) hosted its 10th annual conference.Conference & Symposium
Nov 11 2025Pianist Kong Xiangdong Speaks on Music and LifeWorld-renowned pianist Kong Xiangdong returned to NYU Shanghai for a deeply moving conversation.Conversation with the Vice Chancellor
Oct 31 2025She Speaks: Distinguished Women in Computing Speaker Series Kicks OffNYU Shanghai hosted the first talk of the newly-launched Distinguished Women in Computing Speaker Series.Talks
Oct 29 2025Exploring China on Two WheelsIt was back on the bikes again for the 2025–26 Chancellor’s Discover China Series. On its third annual community cycling tour, Chancellor Tong Shijun invited 40 students, 15 faculty, and 15 staff members to spend the day cycling and exploring scenic Yuandang Lake which straddles Shanghai and Suzhou. External
Sep 25 2025New Exhibition Opens at ICA: Chronologies The exhibition focuses on 19th and 20th century factory workers and students in China and AsiaInstitute of Contemporary Arts Exhibition
Sep 18 2025NYU Shanghai Celebrates Naming of Dangdang AuditoriumIn recognition of the longstanding generosity of Peggy Yu, co-founder and executive chairwoman of Dangdang.comCommunity
Aug 26 2025Off to a Great Start! NYU Shanghai Welcomes Class of 2029On Monday, more than six hundred first-year students of the Class of 2029 gathered together for the University Welcome Ceremony. Student
Jun 12 2025Student Research in the Spotlight: 2025 Undergraduate Research Symposium The Spring 2025 Undergraduate Research Symposium, hosted on May 16, gave students a chance to share their own research with the NYU Shanghai community. Research
Jun 9 2025Mathematical Minds Meet: International Conference on PDEThe International Conference on Partial Differential Equations was held in May.Conference & Symposium
May 25 2025NYU Shanghai Celebrates Class of 2025 CommencementOn Sunday, May 25, an audience of proud families and friends cheered on the Class of 2025.Commencement
May 24 2025NYU Shanghai Celebrates 2025 Graduate Convocation146 PhD and Master’s degree candidates graduating from 11 programs this year.Commencement
May 19 2025NYU Shanghai and NYU Stern Host Inaugural Accounting Research ConferenceOver 60 leading scholars from top institutions gathered to exchange ideas.Conference & Symposium
May 8 2025Welcome, Admitted Students! Admitted Student Weekend took place April 25 to 26, welcoming 28 international admitted students and 34 family members from nine countries to NYU Shanghai for a first-hand look at the student experience, campus community, and the vibrant city of Shanghai. Student
Apr 29 2025Launch Ceremony for the Focus Media Global Talent Scholarship FundThe event recognized the generous contribution of Focusmedia Foundation and marked the launch of the scholarship. Community
Apr 24 2025Tales of “Emergence”: TEDxNYUShanghai’s 8th Annual Conference Inspiring stories of how small actions and united voices prepare us to face tomorrow’s challenges.Student
